entities.name: Jacob
entities.context: Has a framework for super IC model that works for marketing, writing, and content creation

entities.name: super IC model
entities.context: Framework for highly capable individual contributors augmented by AI; proven for marketing, writing, content but unclear if it generalizes to relational roles

entities.name: hybrid model
entities.context: Proposed extension combining super IC with specialized AI agents for people-facing functions

entities.name: specialized AI agents
entities.context: AI tools designed for specific functions, proposed as complement to super IC model for relational work

entities.name: geographic labor arbitrage
entities.context: Economic phenomenon where cost differences across regions drive offshoring; potentially compressed by AI-enabled small teams

entities.name: offshoring economics
entities.context: Cost-based competitive advantage from outsourcing to lower-cost regions; transformation shifts advantage from cost to speed/quality

relationships.context: Jacob's framework demonstrates the super IC model for knowledge work
Hybrid model extends super IC by adding specialized AI agents for relational roles
Hybrid model combines super IC with specialized AI agents
Super IC viability in developed markets compresses labor arbitrage advantages
Labor arbitrage is the mechanism underlying offshoring economics
